title: Vital Syringes
description: Syringe mod allows you to make enemys, players and even yourself burn or be extinguished, can be helpful to save from lava, or kill ender dragon
body:
![Minecraft: Vital Syringes log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0add6e330e4a7a0343ffbc5db1ae6d715bd14565.png)
The Vital Syringes mod introduces a variety of syringes, each with unique effects that can be crafted and used in various gameplay scenarios. Whether you're injecting your opponents, aiding your teammates, or enhancing yourself, this mod provides diverse functionality to your Minecraft experience.

Features

Syringes:
1. Empty Syringe: Crafted with glass and iron, the base item for creating all other syringes.
2. Water Syringe: Extinguish yourself or your teammates by injecting water.
3. Lava Syringe: Attack opponents or yourself with lava.
4. Venom Syringe: Inject your opponents with venom to deal poison damage.
5. Fortified Remedy Syringe: Strengthen yourself or your teammates with a fortified remedy.
6. Nocturnal Sprint Syringe: Gain enhanced speed during nighttime.
7. Deep Dive Syringe: Extend your underwater breathing capabilities.
8. Agility Syringe: Increase your agility for better movement and jumping.
9. Milk Syringe: Clear all effects from yourself or your teammates, similar to drinking milk.

Potions:
1. Potion of Agility: Enhances your movement speed and agility.
2. Potion of Fortified Remedy: Grants enhanced healing and strength.
3. Potion of Nocturnal Sprint: Increases speed during the night.
4. Potion of Deep Dive: Extends underwater breathing.
5. Potion of Venom: Poison effect to harm enemies.

Tools and Blocks:
1. Alchemic Infusion Blend: Essential ingredient for potion mixing.
2. Whisk: Used in the crafting of the Potion Mixer.
3. Potion Mixer: A new block that allows for advanced potion mixing and syringe creation.

How to Use
Crafting Syringes: Start by crafting an empty syringe with glass and iron.
Filling Syringes:
Hold a bucket/bottle in your offhand and the empty syringe in your main hand, then right-click.

Using Syringes:
Inject others by right-clicking on them.
Inject yourself by right-clicking when not aiming at anyone.
Disclaimer
IMPORTANT: THIS IS NOT A PROPAGANDA TO DRUGS, AND WILL NEVER BE.
